chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI I.T.R.A 26 of 2020 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________  For hearing of main case 16.09.2025 None present This reference application is pending since 2020 without any progress. Even five years later applicant, Commissioner Inland Revenue, remains unrepresented without intimation or justification. In view of the judgment of Supreme Court reported as PLD 2020 SC 518 (Commissioner of Inland Revenue Lahore vs. Rafeh Limited), this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
